items.summaryZh: OpenAI 博客报道了人工智能领域的业务发展。来源要点：介绍 OpenAI Presence，这是一个经过验证的企业 AI 代理平台，可帮助组织为客户和内部工作流程部署可信的语音和聊天代理。
items.summaryEn: OpenAI Blog reports a business development in AI. Key point from the source: Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows.
items.overviewZh: OpenAI 博客发布了有关“OpenAI Presence 简介”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: OpenAI Blog published a new update about “Introducing OpenAI Presence”.

items.titleZh: OpenAI 向所有人推出 ChatGPT Health 时发出了重大声明
items.titleEn: OpenAI is making big claims as it rolls out ChatGPT Health to everyone
items.summaryZh: The Verge AI 报道了人工智能的行业发展。消息来源的要点：OpenAI 将于周四向美国所有人推出 ChatGPT Health，让更多人将他们的医疗记录和健康跟踪信息连接到聊天机器人。
items.summaryEn: The Verge AI reports an industry development in AI. Key point from the source: OpenAI is rolling out ChatGPT Health to everyone in the US on Thursday, allowing more people to connect their medical records and health-tracking information to the chatbot.
items.overviewZh: The Verge AI 发布了有关“OpenAI 在向所有人推出 ChatGPT Health 时做出重大声明”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: The Verge AI published a new update about “OpenAI is making big claims as it rolls out ChatGPT Health to everyone”.

items.titleZh: 大学申请 2450 万美元用于启动和维护人工智能系统 - 南达科他州 Searchlight
items.titleEn: Universities ask for $24.5 million to launch and maintain artificial intelligence system - South Dakota Searchlight
items.summaryZh: Google News AI 报道了人工智能产品的开发。消息来源要点：大学要求 2450 万美元用于启动和维护人工智能系统 南达科他州 Searchlight
items.summaryEn: Google News AI reports a product development in AI. Key point from the source: Universities ask for $24.5 million to launch and maintain artificial intelligence system    South Dakota Searchlight
items.overviewZh: 谷歌新闻 AI 发布了有关“大学要求 2450 万美元启动和维护人工智能系统 - 南达科他州 Searchlight”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: Google News AI published a new update about “Universities ask for $24.5 million to launch and maintain artificial intelligence system - South Dakota Searchlight”.

items.titleZh: Anthropic 更新了 Claude 语音模式，推出了更多功能模型
items.titleEn: Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models
items.summaryZh: TechCrunch AI 报告了人工智能的模型开发。消息来源的要点：克劳德的新语音模型将允许您重新安排会议或起草电子邮件。
items.summaryEn: TechCrunch AI reports a model development in AI. Key point from the source: Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email.
items.overviewZh: TechCrunch AI 发布了有关“Anthropic 用更强大的模型更新 Claude 语音模式”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: TechCrunch AI published a new update about “Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models”.

items.titleZh: AT&T 和 Microsoft 通过 Microsoft Foundry 和 AMD 扩展万亿代币工作负载
items.titleEn: AT&T and Microsoft scale trillion-token workloads with Microsoft Foundry and AMD
items.summaryZh: Microsoft Azure 博客报道了人工智能基础设施的发展。来源要点：AT&T 在使用 Microsoft Foundry 托管计算、开放 AI 模型以及 AMD 和 NVIDIA GPU 基础设施开发 OTel2.0 时处理了大约一万亿代币。
items.summaryEn: Microsoft Azure Blog reports an infrastructure development in AI. Key point from the source: AT&T processed approximately one trillion tokens while developing OTel2.0 using Microsoft Foundry Managed Compute, open AI models, and AMD and NVIDIA GPU infrastructure.
items.overviewZh: Microsoft Azure 博客发布了有关“AT&T 和 Microsoft 通过 Microsoft Foundry 和 AMD 扩展万亿代币工作负载”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: Microsoft Azure Blog published a new update about “AT&T and Microsoft scale trillion-token workloads with Microsoft Foundry and AMD”.
